creator: mark@grondar.za
text:
David Muir Sharnoff wrote:
> >Description:
> 
> 	The gmp-1.3.2 package doesn't install the header files that
> 	go with the library.
> 
> 	Actually there another problem: if you sup ports-math from 
> 	2.1-STABLE you don't get a copy of gmp.

In -current, lib{g}mp is a part of the base system. It has been removed
from ports. The headers install properly.
